comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION — before writing any code, creating branches, or running commands: 1. Read this entire prompt. 2. Present a structured summary to the Lead Architect: (a) Milestone objective in your own words. (b) List of work items with 1-sentence descriptions. (c) Files you will modify (full paths). (d) Test strategy. (e) Any risks or ambiguities you see. 3. STOP and WAIT for the Lead Architect to approve. 4. Only proceed with implementation after explicit approval.

metadata.title: M5.4: Config Pipeline Hardening — draft_model_dir + speculative_decoding_enabled wiring, PA Stale TOML Fix, guest_deploy.py update
metadata.parent_task: P5 Task 5 — Qwen3-14B Model Upgrade + Speculative Decoding
metadata.test_baseline: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped in `pytest shared/ services/ tests/ --tb=short -q`
metadata.scope_limit: 11 production files + tests. All changes are config wiring — no algorithmic changes to inference logic.

milestone.title: Config Pipeline Hardening — draft_model_dir + Stale TOML + Speculative Toggle
milestone.objective: Eliminate all hardcoded model paths and speculative-decoding toggles from the production inference pipeline. Make TOML configs the single source of truth for `draft_model_dir` and `speculative_decoding_enabled` in both PA and AO services. Fix PA's stale Qwen2.5 TOML paths. Update guest_deploy.py. Wire both new fields through: TOML → config dataclass → resolver → entrypoint → inference class __init__. Demote shared/constants.py values (DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED) to fallback defaults only — they must not be used as primary config sources in any entrypoint.py file after this milestone, only as import-and-fallback-default in resolver .get() calls.
milestone.rationale: Both PA and AO inference classes accept draft_model_dir in __init__ but neither entrypoint passes it — both rely on the hardcoded constant fallback. This is a latent config pipeline gap. The PA TOML files also still reference the legacy Qwen2.5-1.5B model. This milestone closes both gaps and adds speculative_decoding_enabled to the TOML surface so the operator can toggle speculative decoding without code changes.

role_constraints.role: Execution Agent — implements exactly the scoped milestone below.
role_constraints.constraint: Windows 11 host, PowerShell terminal, Python venv at `.venv/`.
Stop after milestone completion — do not start unrequested work.
Do NOT modify inference algorithms or generation logic. Only wire config plumbing.
Do NOT modify shared/constants.py. Constants remain as fallback defaults.

file.description: WI-1: Fix stale model_dir/weight_manifest (qwen2.5→qwen3-14b). WI-2: Add draft_model_dir. WI-3: Add speculative_decoding_enabled.
WI-1: Fix stale model_dir/weight_manifest. WI-2: Add draft_model_dir. WI-3: Add speculative_decoding_enabled.
WI-2: Add draft_model_dir. WI-3: Add speculative_decoding_enabled. (model_dir already correct.)
WI-2: Add draft_model_dir. WI-3: Add speculative_decoding_enabled.
WI-4: Add fields to PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig. WI-6: Update _load_entrypoint_config resolver. WI-8: Update _phase_model_load to pass new params. WI-12: Update _validate_config_data.
WI-5: Add fields to AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig. WI-7: Update _load_entrypoint_config resolver. WI-9: Update start() to pass new params. WI-12: Update _validate_config_data.
WI-10: Add speculative_decoding_enabled parameter to __init__. Update load_model() to use instance attribute instead of constant import.
WI-10: Add speculative_decoding_enabled parameter to __init__. Update load_model() to use instance attribute instead of constant import.
WI-11: Fix stale _MODEL_DIRS (qwen2.5→qwen3-14b, add qwen3-0.6b draft).
WI-13: Update _write_minimal_config TOML fixture (stale model paths + add new fields). Update any PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig instantiations if present.
WI-13: Update AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig instantiations at lines ~206 and ~267 to include new fields.

item.title: Fix PA stale TOML model paths (CRITICAL)
item.description: Update model_dir and weight_manifest in BOTH PA TOML files from legacy Qwen2.5-1.5B paths to Qwen3-14B paths. This is CRITICAL — PA would attempt to load the wrong model without this fix.
item.details:
=== services/policy_agent/config/default.toml ===
CURRENT (STALE — lines 14-16): ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" # ADR-010: PA classification on Intel Arc 140V model_dir = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu/manifest.json" ```
TARGET: ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" # ADR-010: PA classification on Intel Arc 140V model_dir = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: Qwen3-14B INT4 weight_manifest = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/manifest.json" # ADR-012 ```
=== services/policy_agent/config/guest_runtime.toml ===
CURRENT (STALE — lines 13-15): ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu/manifest.json" ```
TARGET: ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: Qwen3-14B INT4 weight_manifest = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/manifest.json" # ADR-012 ```
CRITICAL: Do NOT change [inference] to [gpu]. PA uses [inference], AO uses [gpu].

item.title: Add draft_model_dir to all 4 TOML configs
item.description: Add draft_model_dir field to the inference/gpu section of all 4 TOML files. Value: "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" (ADR-012 draft model).
item.details:
PA files: Add to [inference] section, after weight_manifest: ```toml draft_model_dir = "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: draft model (speculative decoding) ```
AO files: Add to [gpu] section, after weight_manifest: ```toml draft_model_dir = "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: draft model (speculative decoding) ```

item.title: Add speculative_decoding_enabled to all 4 TOML configs
item.description: Add speculative_decoding_enabled boolean to the inference/gpu section of all 4 TOML files.
item.details:
PA files: Add to [inference] section, after draft_model_dir: ```toml speculative_decoding_enabled = true # ADR-012 §2.6: Qwen3-0.6B draft acceleration ```
AO files: Add to [gpu] section, after draft_model_dir: ```toml speculative_decoding_enabled = true # ADR-012 §2.6: Qwen3-0.6B draft acceleration ```

item.title: Add fields to PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig dataclass
item.description: Add draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled to the frozen PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig dataclass.
item.details:
File: services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py
CURRENT (line ~70): ```python @dataclass(frozen=True) class PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig: """Resolved startup config for the Policy Agent entrypoint."""
config_dir: Path model_dir: Path manifest_path: Path | None model_bin_path: Path device: str dev_mode: bool jwt_key_path: Path | None jwt_ca_cert_path: Path | None jwt_issuer: str jwt_validity_seconds: int vsock_config: VsockConfig deployment_mode: DeploymentMode ```
TARGET — add two new fields after model_bin_path: ```python @dataclass(frozen=True) class PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig: """Resolved startup config for the Policy Agent entrypoint."""
config_dir: Path model_dir: Path manifest_path: Path | None model_bin_path: Path draft_model_dir: Path speculative_decoding_enabled: bool device: str dev_mode: bool jwt_key_path: Path | None jwt_ca_cert_path: Path | None jwt_issuer: str jwt_validity_seconds: int vsock_config: VsockConfig deployment_mode: DeploymentMode ```
NOTE: No default values — the resolver MUST always provide these.

item.title: Add fields to AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig dataclass
item.description: Add draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled to the frozen AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig dataclass.
item.details:
File: services/assistant_orchestrator/src/entrypoint.py
CURRENT (line ~74): ```python @dataclass(frozen=True) class AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig: """Resolved startup config for assistant orchestrator entrypoint."""
model_dir: Path manifest_path: Path | None device: str priority: int max_new_tokens: int generation_temperature: float generation_top_k: int generation_top_p: float generation_repetition_penalty: float generation_do_sample: bool response_depth_mode: str dev_mode: bool jwt_ca_cert_path: Path | None vsock_config: VsockConfig pgov_cosine_threshold: float deployment_mode: DeploymentMode ```
TARGET — add two new fields after manifest_path: ```python @dataclass(frozen=True) class AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig: """Resolved startup config for assistant orchestrator entrypoint."""
model_dir: Path manifest_path: Path | None draft_model_dir: Path speculative_decoding_enabled: bool device: str priority: int max_new_tokens: int generation_temperature: float generation_top_k: int generation_top_p: float generation_repetition_penalty: float generation_do_sample: bool response_depth_mode: str dev_mode: bool jwt_ca_cert_path: Path | None vsock_config: VsockConfig pgov_cosine_threshold: float deployment_mode: DeploymentMode ```

item.title: Update PA _load_entrypoint_config resolver
item.description: Read draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled from the [inference] TOML section and pass them into the PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig constructor. Import DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH and SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED from shared.constants as fallback defaults for the resolver only.
item.details:
File: services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py
Step 1 — Add import at top of file (in the shared imports block): ```python from shared.constants import DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED ```
Step 2 — In _load_entrypoint_config(), after the manifest_path resolution (around the line `model_bin_path = model_dir / "openvino_model.bin"`), add:
```python draft_model_dir_raw = str(inference.get("draft_model_dir", DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH)).strip() draft_model_dir = self._resolve_path(repo_root, service_root, draft_model_dir_raw)
speculative_decoding_enabled = inference.get( "speculative_decoding_enabled", SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED, ) if not isinstance(speculative_decoding_enabled, bool): speculative_decoding_enabled = bool(speculative_decoding_enabled) ```
Step 3 — In the PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig() constructor call, add: ```python draft_model_dir=draft_model_dir, speculative_decoding_enabled=speculative_decoding_enabled, ``` after `model_bin_path=model_bin_path,`.
CRITICAL: The import goes into entrypoint.py, but these constants are ONLY used as .get() fallback defaults — the TOML value takes precedence.

item.title: Update AO _load_entrypoint_config resolver
item.description: Read draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled from the [gpu] TOML section and pass them into the AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig constructor. Import constants as fallback defaults.
item.details:
File: services/assistant_orchestrator/src/entrypoint.py
Step 1 — Add import at top of file (in the shared imports block): ```python from shared.constants import DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED ```
Step 2 — In _load_entrypoint_config(), after the manifest_path resolution (around `manifest_path = self._resolve_path(...)` block), add:
```python draft_model_dir_raw = str(gpu.get("draft_model_dir", DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH)).strip() draft_model_dir = self._resolve_path(repo_root, service_root, draft_model_dir_raw)
speculative_decoding_enabled = gpu.get( "speculative_decoding_enabled", SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED, ) if not isinstance(speculative_decoding_enabled, bool): speculative_decoding_enabled = bool(speculative_decoding_enabled) ```
Step 3 — In the AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig() constructor call, add: ```python draft_model_dir=draft_model_dir, speculative_decoding_enabled=speculative_decoding_enabled, ``` after `manifest_path=manifest_path,`.

item.title: Update PA _phase_model_load to pass new params
item.description: Pass draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled from the resolved config to PolicyGPUInference.__init__().
item.details:
File: services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py
CURRENT (in _phase_model_load, ~line 299): ```python inference = PolicyGPUInference( model_dir=str(resolved.model_dir), device=resolved.device, manifest_path=( str(resolved.manifest_path) if resolved.manifest_path is not None else None ), ) ```
TARGET: ```python inference = PolicyGPUInference( model_dir=str(resolved.model_dir), device=resolved.device, manifest_path=( str(resolved.manifest_path) if resolved.manifest_path is not None else None ), draft_model_dir=str(resolved.draft_model_dir), speculative_decoding_enabled=resolved.speculative_decoding_enabled, ) ```

item.title: Update AO start() to pass new params
item.description: Pass draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled from the resolved config to OrchestratorGPUInference.__init__().
item.details:
File: services/assistant_orchestrator/src/entrypoint.py
CURRENT (in start(), ~line 222): ```python inference = OrchestratorGPUInference( model_dir=str(resolved.model_dir), device=resolved.device, priority=resolved.priority, max_tokens=resolved.max_new_tokens, manifest_path=(str(resolved.manifest_path) if resolved.manifest_path else None), ) ```
TARGET: ```python inference = OrchestratorGPUInference( model_dir=str(resolved.model_dir), device=resolved.device, priority=resolved.priority, max_tokens=resolved.max_new_tokens, manifest_path=(str(resolved.manifest_path) if resolved.manifest_path else None), draft_model_dir=str(resolved.draft_model_dir), speculative_decoding_enabled=resolved.speculative_decoding_enabled, ) ```

item.title: Wire speculative_decoding_enabled through inference class __init__
item.description: Add speculative_decoding_enabled parameter to both PolicyGPUInference and OrchestratorGPUInference __init__. Store as instance attribute. Update load_model() in both classes to use the instance attribute instead of directly importing SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED.
item.details:
=== services/policy_agent/src/gpu_inference.py ===
CURRENT __init__ (line 522): ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = 0, manifest_path: str | None = None, draft_model_dir: str | None = None, ) -> None: self._model_dir = Path(model_dir) self._device = device self._priority = priority self._manifest_path = manifest_path self._draft_model_dir = ( Path(draft_model_dir) if draft_model_dir else Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) ) ```
TARGET __init__: ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = 0, manifest_path: str | None = None, draft_model_dir: str | None = None, speculative_decoding_enabled: bool | None = None, ) -> None: self._model_dir = Path(model_dir) self._device = device self._priority = priority self._manifest_path = manifest_path self._draft_model_dir = ( Path(draft_model_dir) if draft_model_dir else Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) ) self._speculative_decoding_enabled = ( speculative_decoding_enabled if speculative_decoding_enabled is not None else SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED ) ```
Then replace ALL direct reads of SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED with self._speculative_decoding_enabled. There are two locations:
Location 1 — load_model() (~line 622): ```python if SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED: ``` becomes: ```python if self._speculative_decoding_enabled: ```
Location 2 — classification gen_config builder (~line 730): ```python if SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED: try: gen_config.num_assistant_tokens = NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS ``` becomes: ```python if self._speculative_decoding_enabled: try: gen_config.num_assistant_tokens = NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS ```
IMPORTANT: Both locations must be updated. Do NOT leave line 730 reading the module constant while load_model() uses self._speculative_decoding_enabled.
=== services/assistant_orchestrator/src/gpu_inference.py ===
CURRENT __init__ (line 274): ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = NPU_PRIORITY, max_tokens: int = OUTPUT_TOKEN_CAP, manifest_path: str | None = None, draft_model_dir: str | None = None, ) -> None: self._model_dir = Path(model_dir) self._device = device self._priority = priority self._max_tokens = max_tokens self._manifest_path = manifest_path self._draft_model_dir = ( Path(draft_model_dir) if draft_model_dir else Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) ) ```
TARGET __init__: ```python def __init__( self, model_dir: str, device: str = "GPU", priority: int = NPU_PRIORITY, max_tokens: int = OUTPUT_TOKEN_CAP, manifest_path: str | None = None, draft_model_dir: str | None = None, speculative_decoding_enabled: bool | None = None, ) -> None: self._model_dir = Path(model_dir) self._device = device self._priority = priority self._max_tokens = max_tokens self._manifest_path = manifest_path self._draft_model_dir = ( Path(draft_model_dir) if draft_model_dir else Path(DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH) ) self._speculative_decoding_enabled = ( speculative_decoding_enabled if speculative_decoding_enabled is not None else SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED ) ```
Then in load_model(), replace ALL direct reads of SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED with self._speculative_decoding_enabled. There are two locations:
Location 1 (~line 399): ```python use_speculative = ( SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED and draft_dir.exists() ) ``` becomes: ```python use_speculative = ( self._speculative_decoding_enabled and draft_dir.exists() ) ```
Location 2 (~line 867) — in the generation config builder method (e.g., _build_default_gen_config or the gen_config setup block), replace: ```python if SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED: try: gen_config.num_assistant_tokens = NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS ``` becomes: ```python if self._speculative_decoding_enabled: try: gen_config.num_assistant_tokens = NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS ``` If any other references exist in log message strings, leave those unchanged — only change boolean condition checks.
BACKWARD COMPATIBILITY: The `speculative_decoding_enabled` parameter defaults to None → falls back to SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED constant. Tests that instantiate inference classes directly (without the entrypoint) continue to work unchanged via this fallback.
IMPORTANT: Do NOT remove the `from shared.constants import SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED` import from either gpu_inference.py. It is still needed as the fallback default in __init__. Only the load_model() code path changes from reading the module-level constant to reading self._speculative_decoding_enabled.

item.title: Update guest_deploy.py model directories
item.description: Fix _MODEL_DIRS: replace stale qwen2.5 path with qwen3-14b, add qwen3-0.6b draft.
item.details:
File: launcher/guest_deploy.py
CURRENT (line ~61): ```python _MODEL_DIRS: tuple[str, ...] = ( "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/onnx-fp16", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/openvino-int8", ) ```
TARGET: ```python _MODEL_DIRS: tuple[str, ...] = ( "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu", # ADR-012: Target model "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu", # ADR-012: Draft model (speculative decoding) "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/onnx-fp16", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/openvino-int8", ) ```

item.title: Config validation for new TOML fields
item.description: Both _validate_config_data() methods should validate that draft_model_dir is a non-empty string when speculative_decoding_enabled is true. This is a soft validation — no path existence check at validation time (that happens at model load time in gpu_inference.py).
item.details:
=== PA _validate_config_data (services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py) ===
After the existing `self._require_non_empty_str(inference, "model_dir", ...)` line, add validation for speculative decoding fields:
```python spec_decode = inference.get("speculative_decoding_enabled") if spec_decode is True: draft_dir = inference.get("draft_model_dir") if not isinstance(draft_dir, str) or not draft_dir.strip(): raise ConfigResolutionError( code="PA_CFG_DRAFT_MODEL_DIR_MISSING", message="'inference.draft_model_dir' is required when speculative_decoding_enabled=true.", ) ```
=== AO _validate_config_data (services/assistant_orchestrator/src/entrypoint.py) ===
After the existing `self._require_non_empty_str(gpu, "model_dir", ...)` line, add:
```python spec_decode = gpu.get("speculative_decoding_enabled") if spec_decode is True: draft_dir = gpu.get("draft_model_dir") if not isinstance(draft_dir, str) or not draft_dir.strip(): raise ConfigResolutionError( code="AO_CFG_DRAFT_MODEL_DIR_MISSING", message="'gpu.draft_model_dir' is required when speculative_decoding_enabled=true.", ) ```
NOTE: When speculative_decoding_enabled is false or absent, draft_model_dir is not required (the constant fallback handles it, and load_model() will skip speculative decoding anyway).

item.title: Update test fixtures for new dataclass fields
item.description: Update test files that construct config dataclass instances or write minimal TOML configs. All must include the new fields.
item.details:
=== services/policy_agent/tests/test_entrypoint.py ===
The _write_minimal_config() helper (line ~19) writes a TOML string inline. Update the [inference] section to use correct model paths AND add the new fields:
CURRENT: ```python [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu/manifest.json" ```
TARGET: ```python [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/manifest.json" draft_model_dir = "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" speculative_decoding_enabled = true ```
Also search for any PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig() constructor calls in this file. If found, add the two new fields (draft_model_dir=Path("models/..."), speculative_decoding_enabled=True).
=== services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_entrypoint.py ===
Two locations construct AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig directly: - Line ~206: test_handle_connection_prompt_streams_and_completes - Line ~267: test_handle_connection_model_time_streaming_callback
In BOTH, add after `manifest_path=None,`: ```python draft_model_dir=Path("models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu"), speculative_decoding_enabled=True, ```
Ensure the Path import is available (it already is — check top of file).

item.title: Regression test gate
item.description: Run the full regression suite. Must match M5.3 baseline.
item.details:
Command: pytest shared/ services/ tests/ --tb=short -q
Expected: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped.
If any NEW failures appear, diagnose and fix before committing. The TOML changes should not affect test outcomes because entrypoint tests use in-memory fixture configs. The dataclass field additions will only affect tests that construct configs directly (WI-13 handles those).

execution_order.step: WI-1: Fix PA stale TOML model paths (both files)
WI-2 + WI-3: Add draft_model_dir and speculative_decoding_enabled to all 4 TOMLs
WI-4 + WI-5: Add fields to both config dataclasses
WI-6 + WI-7: Update both config resolvers (add imports + read from TOML + pass to constructor)
WI-8 + WI-9: Update PA _phase_model_load and AO start() to pass new params
WI-10: Wire speculative_decoding_enabled through both gpu_inference __init__ + load_model
WI-12: Add config validation for draft_model_dir

context_notes.note: PA entrypoint config resolver reads `config_data.get("inference", {})`. AO entrypoint config resolver reads `config_data.get("gpu", {})`. These are DIFFERENT section names by design — do NOT normalize them.

Neither PA nor AO entrypoint.py currently has any import from shared.constants. WI-6 and WI-7 add `from shared.constants import DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH, SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED` to both files. These constants are used ONLY as fallback defaults in the resolver's .get() calls — the TOML value always takes precedence when present.

Both PolicyGPUInference.__init__ and OrchestratorGPUInference.__init__ already have a `draft_model_dir: str | None = None` parameter with constant fallback. WI-10 adds the new `speculative_decoding_enabled` parameter following the same pattern. WI-8/WI-9 ensure the entrypoints pass both values explicitly.

services/assistant_orchestrator/src/constants.py line 41 re-exports SPECULATIVE_DECODING = SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED. This local alias is used elsewhere in the AO codebase. Do NOT modify it — it remains a valid re-export. The AO gpu_inference.py imports SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED directly from shared.constants (not from the local re-export).

After all changes, run these verification commands to confirm the directive requirements are met: 1. `Select-String "DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH|SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED" services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py` → Must show ONLY the import line and the .get() fallback default usages. Must NOT appear in _phase_model_load or the dataclass constructor call. 2. `Select-String "DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH|SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED" services/assistant_orchestrator/src/entrypoint.py` → Same: only import + .get() fallback. 3. `Select-String "qwen2.5" services/policy_agent/config/default.toml, services/policy_agent/config/guest_runtime.toml, launcher/guest_deploy.py` → Must return ZERO matches. 4. `Select-String "draft_model_dir" services/policy_agent/config/default.toml, services/assistant_orchestrator/config/default.toml` → Must return matches in both files. 5. `Select-String "speculative_decoding_enabled" services/policy_agent/config/default.toml, services/assistant_orchestrator/config/default.toml` → Must return matches in both files.

Do NOT modify shared/constants.py. DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH and SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED remain as-is. They serve as fallback defaults for: (a) the entrypoint resolver .get() calls when a TOML key is absent, and (b) the inference class __init__ when instantiated directly in tests without entrypoint wiring.

note.title: Scope boundary — NO runtime validation in this milestone

context_notes.note: The original M5.4 prompt included runtime validation (launcher boot, smoke tests, evidence capture). That scope is REMOVED from this revised prompt. This milestone is CODE-ONLY: config wiring + tests. Runtime validation will be a separate follow-up milestone if needed.

note.title: Scope boundary — NO ledger/implementation plan updates

context_notes.note: Ledger entries and IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN updates are NOT in scope for this milestone. Those will be handled in a follow-up or by the SDO after merge.

gate.criteria: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped. No regressions from M5.3 baseline.
ZERO matches — all stale model references eliminated.

verification.description: Terminal commands the Lead Architect can run after the milestone to confirm success.

commit_template.message:
feat(config): wire draft_model_dir + speculative_decoding_enabled through TOML pipeline (M5.4)
Config Pipeline Hardening — Lead Architect Directive 2026-04-17: - Fix PA TOML stale model_dir (qwen2.5-1.5b→qwen3-14b) in default + guest_runtime - Add draft_model_dir + speculative_decoding_enabled to all 4 TOML configs - Add fields to PolicyAgentEntrypointConfig + AssistantOrchestratorEntrypointConfig - Update both _load_entrypoint_config resolvers to read new TOML fields - Update PA _phase_model_load + AO start() to pass draft_model_dir + speculative_decoding_enabled - Wire speculative_decoding_enabled through PolicyGPUInference + OrchestratorGPUInference __init__ - Update load_model() to use self._speculative_decoding_enabled (not constant import) - Update launcher/guest_deploy.py _MODEL_DIRS (qwen3-14b + qwen3-0.6b draft) - Add config validation: draft_model_dir required when speculative_decoding_enabled=true - Update test fixtures (PA test TOML + AO config dataclass instantiations)
TOML is now single source of truth. Constants demoted to fallback defaults only.
Test: pytest shared/ services/ tests/ — 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped

attachment.reason: PA entrypoint — dataclass, resolver, model load, validation
AO entrypoint — dataclass, resolver, start(), validation
PA default config (STALE — to be fixed)
PA guest config (STALE — to be fixed)
